alternative_name.description: An alternative name for the worm

gene_id.description: An ID reference to a gene from your labguru genes collection

phenotype.description: Observable physical or biochemical characteristics of the worm

mutagen.description: The agent used to induce mutations in the worm

growth_conditions.description: Specific conditions under which the worm is maintained

outcrossed.description: Number of times the worm strain has been outcrossed with another

dauer_defective.description:
Indicates whether the worm is defective in entering or exiting the dauer stage,
                    with '1' for yes and '0' for no.
